name: constipation
title: best herbal teas for constipation
description: Cinchona officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as quinine, alkaloids, and glycosides that help to treat constipation by stimulating digestive enzymes, improving gut motility, and enhancing bowel regularity. This herbal tea also possesses laxative properties, which help to relieve constipation by softening stool and promoting its easy passage through the digestive system.
